1.name: blink
1.lore: The fabled dagger used by the fastest assassin ever to walk the lands.

abilities.title: Blink
abilities.description:
Teleport to a target point up to 1200 units away. 

Blink Dagger cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

2.name: blades_of_attack
2.lore: The damage of these small, concealable blades should not be underestimated.

3.name: broadsword
3.lore: The classic weapon of choice for knights, this blade is sturdy and reliable for slaying enemies.

4.name: chainmail
4.lore: A medium weave of metal chains.

5.name: claymore
5.lore: A sword that can cut through armor, it's a commonly chosen first weapon for budding swordsmen.

6.name: helm_of_iron_will
6.lore: The helmet of a legendary warrior who fell in battle.

7.name: javelin
7.lore: A rather typical spear that can sometimes pierce through an enemy's armor when used to attack.

abilities.title: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 25% chance to pierce through evasion and deal 60 bonus magical damage.

8.name: mithril_hammer
8.lore: A hammer forged of pure mithril.

9.name: platemail
9.lore: Thick metal plates that protect the entire upper body. Avoid dropping on feet.

10.name: quarterstaff
10.lore: A basic staff that allows you to strike quickly.

11.name: quelling_blade
11.lore: The axe of a fallen gnome, it allows you to effectively maneuver the forest.

abilities.title: Chop Tree
abilities.description: Destroy a target tree.

abilities.title: Quell
abilities.description: Increases attack damage against non-hero units by 8 for melee heroes, and 4 for ranged.

12.name: ring_of_protection
12.lore: A glimmering ring that defends its bearer.

13.name: gauntlets
13.lore: Studded leather gloves that add brute strength.

14.name: slippers
14.lore: Light boots made from spider skin that tingles your senses.

15.name: mantle
15.lore: A beautiful sapphire mantle worn by generations of queens.

16.name: branches
16.lore: A seemingly ordinary branch, its ironlike qualities are bestowed upon the bearer.

abilities.title: Plant Tree
abilities.description: Targets the ground to plant a happy little tree that lasts for 20 seconds.

17.name: belt_of_strength
17.lore: A valued accessory for improving vitality.

18.name: boots_of_elves
18.lore: A tensile fabric often used for its light weight and ease of movement.

19.name: robe
19.lore: This robe corrupts the soul of the user, but provides wisdom in return.

20.name: circlet
20.lore: An elegant circlet designed for human princesses.

21.name: ogre_axe
21.lore: You grow stronger just by holding it.

22.name: blade_of_alacrity
22.lore: A long blade imbued with time magic.

23.name: staff_of_wizardry
23.lore: A staff of magical powers passed down from the eldest mages.

24.name: ultimate_orb
24.lore: A mystical orb containing the essence of life.

25.name: gloves
25.lore: A pair of magical gloves that seems to render weapons weightless.

26.name: lifesteal
26.lore: A mask that drains the energy of those caught in its gaze.

abilities.title: Lifesteal
abilities.description: Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.

27.name: ring_of_regen
27.lore: This ring is considered a good luck charm among the Gnomes.

28.name: sobi_mask
28.lore: A mask commonly used by mages and warlocks for various rituals.

30.name: gem
30.lore:
Not one thrall creature of the depths,
Nor spirit bound in drowning's keep,
Nor Maelrawn the Tentacular,
Shall rest till seas, gem comes to sleep.

abilities.title: Reveal
abilities.description: Gives True Sight over a 300 radius revealing wards and units even in Fog of War.

abilities.title: True Sight
abilities.description: Grants the ability to see invisible units and wards to any allied vision within 900 range of its carrier.

abilities.title: Everlasting
abilities.description: Dropped on death, and cannot be destroyed.

31.name: cloak
31.lore: A cloak made of a magical material that works to dispel any magic cast on it.

32.name: talisman_of_evasion
32.lore: A necklace that allows you to anticipate enemy attacks.

33.name: cheese
33.lore: Made from the milk of a long lost Furbolg vendor, it restores the vitality of those who taste it.

abilities.title: Fondue
abilities.description: Instantly restores 2500 health and 1500 mana.

34.name: magic_stick
34.lore: A simple wand used to channel magic energies, it is favored by apprentice wizards and great warlocks alike.

abilities.title: Energy Charge
abilities.description:
Instantly restores 15 health and mana per charge stored.

 Max 10 charges. Gains a charge whenever a visible enemy within 1200 range uses an ability.

36.name: magic_wand
36.lore: A simple wand used to channel magic energies, it is favored by apprentice wizards and great warlocks alike.

abilities.title: Energy Charge
abilities.description:
Instantly restores 15 health and mana per charge stored. 

Max 20 charges. Gains a charge whenever a visible enemy within 1200 range uses an ability.

37.name: ghost
37.lore: Imbues the wielder with a ghostly presence, allowing them to evade physical damage.

abilities.title: Ghost Form
abilities.description: You enter ghost form for 4 seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but are unable to attack and -30% more vulnerable to magic damage.

38.name: clarity
38.lore: Clear water that enhances the ability to meditate.

abilities.title: Replenish
abilities.description:
Grants 6 mana regeneration to the target for 25 seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

39.name: flask
39.lore: A magical salve that can quickly mend even the deepest of wounds.

abilities.title: Salve
abilities.description:
Grants 30 health regeneration to the target for 13 seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Heals for half the amount per second when cast on an ally.

40.name: dust
40.lore: One may hide visage, but never volume.

abilities.title: Reveal
abilities.description:
For 12 seconds, creates an area that reveals and slows invisible heroes by -20% in a 1050 radius where the caster was standing. Invisible units revealed by dust take 25 damage.

 The debuff effect on enemies lingers for 8s after leaving the area of effect.

41.name: bottle
41.lore: An old bottle that survived the ages, the contents placed inside become enchanted.

abilities.title: Regenerate
abilities.description:
Consumes a charge to restore 110 health and 60 mana over 2.7 seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

The Bottle automatically refills at the fountain.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.

abilities.title: Store Rune
abilities.description:
Runes can be stored in the Bottle for later use by right-clicking them. Unused runes will automatically activate after 90 seconds.

Using a stored rune fully refills the Bottle.

42.name: ward_observer
42.lore: A form of half-sentient plant, often cultivated by apprentice wizards.

abilities.title: Plant
abilities.description:
Plants an Observer Ward, an invisible watcher that gives ground vision in a 1600 radius to your team. Lasts 6 minutes.

Hold Control to give one Observer Ward to an allied hero.

43.name: ward_sentry
43.lore: A form of plant originally grown in the garden of a fearful king.

abilities.title: Plant
abilities.description:
Plants a Sentry Ward, an invisible watcher that grants True Sight, the ability to see invisible enemy units and wards, to any existing allied vision within a 1050 radius.
Lasts 7 minutes.

Does not grant ground vision.
Hold Control to give one Sentry Ward to an allied hero.

44.name: tango
44.lore: Forage to survive on the battlefield.

abilities.title: Devour
abilities.description:
Consumes a target tree to gain 7 health regeneration for 16 seconds. Consuming an Ironwood Tree doubles the heal duration.

Comes with 3 charges. Can be used on an allied hero to give them one Tango.

Tree Range: 165

abilities.title: Teleport
abilities.description:
After channeling for 3 seconds, teleports you to a target friendly building. 

Double-click to teleport to your team's base fountain.

abilities.title: Town Portal Scroll
abilities.description: Upgrades your Town Portal Scroll, allowing it to target units, reduces cooldown and does not consume a charge on usage.

50.name: phase_boots
50.lore: Boots that allow the wearer to travel between the ether.

abilities.title: Phase
abilities.description: Gives 20% increased movement speed on melee heroes, and 10% on ranged heroes, and lets you move through units and turn more quickly for 3 seconds.

51.name: demon_edge
51.lore: One of the oldest weapons forged by the Demon-Smith Abzidian, it killed its maker when he tested its edge.

52.name: eagle
52.lore: Capturing the majestic call of an eagle, this mystical horn brings limitless dexterity to those who hear it.

53.name: reaver
53.lore: A massive axe capable of tearing whole mountains down.

54.name: relic
54.lore: An ancient weapon that often turns the tides of war.

55.name: hyperstone
55.lore: A mystical, carved stone that boosts the fervor of the holder.

56.name: ring_of_health
56.lore: A shiny ring found beneath a fat halfling's corpse.

57.name: void_stone
57.lore: Jewelry that was once used to channel nether realm magic, this ring pulses with energy.

58.name: mystic_staff
58.lore: Enigmatic staff made of only the most expensive crystals.

59.name: energy_booster
59.lore: This lapis gemstone is commonly added to the collection of wizards seeking to improve their presence in combat.

60.name: point_booster
60.lore: A perfectly formed amethyst that nourishes body and mind when held.

61.name: vitality_booster
61.lore: A ruby gemstone that has been passed down through generations of warrior kin.

63.name: power_treads
63.lore: A pair of tough-skinned boots that change to meet the demands of the wearer.

abilities.title: Switch Attribute
abilities.description: Switches between +10 Strength, +10 Agility, or +10 Intelligence.

65.name: hand_of_midas
65.lore: Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.

abilities.title: Transmute
abilities.description:
Kills a non-hero target for 160 gold. Killing a neutral creep additionally grants a madstone bundle. 

 Cannot be used on Ancient creeps.

67.name: oblivion_staff
67.lore: Deceptively hidden as an ordinary staff, it is actually very powerful, much like the Eldritch who originally possessed it.

69.name: pers
69.lore: A gem that grants heart to the bearer.

73.name: bracer
73.lore: The bracer is a common choice to toughen up defenses and increase longevity.

75.name: wraith_band
75.lore: A circlet with faint whispers echoing about it.

77.name: null_talisman
77.lore: A small gemstone attached to several chains.

79.name: mekansm
79.lore: A glowing jewel formed out of assorted parts that somehow fit together perfectly.

abilities.title: Restore
abilities.description: Restores 250 health to allied units in a 1200 radius.

abilities.title: Mekansm Aura
abilities.description: Grants 2.5 health regeneration to allied units in a 1200 radius.

81.name: vladmir
81.lore: An eerie mask that is haunted with the malice of a fallen vampire.

abilities.title: Vladmir's Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 20% lifesteal, 18% bonus damage, 1 mana regeneration, and 2 armor to nearby allies.

Radius: 1200

86.name: buckler
86.lore: A powerful shield that imbues the bearer with the strength of heroes past, it is capable of protecting entire armies in battle.

abilities.title: Buckler Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 2 armor to allied player units.

Radius: 1200

88.name: ring_of_basilius
88.lore: Ring given as a reward to the greatest mages.

abilities.title: Basilius Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 1 mana regeneration to allies. 

Radius: 1200

90.name: pipe
90.lore: A powerful artifact of mysterious origin, it creates barriers against magical forces.

abilities.title: Barrier
abilities.description:
Gives a magic damage barrier that absorbs 425 damage to all nearby allies. Lasts 8 seconds.

Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Insight Aura
abilities.description:
Gives allied units 2.5 health regeneration and 8% magic resistance.

Radius: 1200

92.name: urn_of_shadows
92.lore: Contains the ashes of powerful demons.

abilities.title: Soul Release
abilities.description:
Provides 30 health regeneration when cast on allies, and deals 25 damage per second when cast on enemies. Lasts 8 seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within 1500 units.

94.name: headdress
94.lore: Creates a soothing aura that restores allies in battle.

abilities.title: Regeneration Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 2 health regeneration to allies.

Radius: 1200

96.name: sheepstick
96.lore: The most guarded relic among the cult of Vyse, it is the most coveted weapon among magi.

abilities.title: Hex
abilities.description:
Turns a target unit into a harmless critter for 2.8 seconds. The target has a base movement speed of 140 and will be silenced, muted, and disarmed.
Instantly destroys illusions.

98.name: orchid
98.lore: A garnet rod constructed from the essence of a fire demon.

abilities.title: Soul Burn
abilities.description: Silences the target unit for 5 seconds. At the end of the silence, 30% of the damage received while silenced is inflicted as bonus magical damage.

100.name: cyclone
100.lore: A mysterious scepter passed down through the ages, its disruptive winds can be used for good or evil.

abilities.title: Cyclone
abilities.description:
Sweeps a target unit up into a cyclone, making them invulnerable for 2.5 seconds. Cyclone can only be cast on enemy units or yourself.

Enemy units take 50 magical damage upon landing.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

102.name: force_staff
102.lore: Allows you to manipulate others, for good or evil.

abilities.title: Force
abilities.description: Pushes any target unit 600 units in the direction it is facing.

104.name: dagon
104.lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.title: Energy Burst
abilities.description:
Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Heals the caster 75% of damage dealt by Dagon. Upgradable.

Damage: 400
 Mana Cost: 120

106.name: necronomicon
106.lore: Considered the ultimate in necromancy and demonology, a powerful malefic force is locked within its pages.

abilities.title: Demonic Summoning
abilities.description:
Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for 60 seconds.

Warrior: Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 25
Mana Break Damage: 30
Last Will Damage: 600

Archer: Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 37
Aura Move Speed: 5
Aura Radius: 1200

108.name: ultimate_scepter
108.lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

abilities.title: Ability Upgrade
abilities.description: Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.

110.name: refresher
110.lore: A powerful artifact created for wizards.

abilities.title: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Resets the cooldowns of all your items and abilities. Shares a cooldown with Refresher Shard. This item's cooldown only progresses in your hero's main inventory.

112.name: assault
112.lore: Forged in the depths of the nether reaches, this hellish mail provides an army with increased armor and attack speed.

abilities.title: Assault Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 30 attack speed and 5 armor to nearby allied units and structures, and decreases nearby enemy unit and structure armor by -5.

Radius: 1200

114.name: heart
114.lore: Preserved heart of an extinct monster, it bolsters the bearer's fortitude.

abilities.title: Behemoth's Blood
abilities.description: Your health regeneration is increased by 1.5% of your missing health.

116.name: black_king_bar
116.lore: A powerful staff imbued with the strength of giants.

abilities.title: Avatar
abilities.description:
Applies a basic dispel. Grants 60% Magic resistance and immunity to pure and reflected damage. For the duration of the effect, any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect. 

Duration: 9 
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

117.name: aegis
117.lore: The Immortal was said to own a shield that protected him from death itself.

abilities.title: Reincarnation
abilities.description:
Brings you to life with full health and mana 5 seconds after you die, at the location where you died. 

Reincarnation must be used within 5 minutes or Aegis of the Immortal disappears. If it expires, it will heal you over 5 seconds (dispels on damage).

119.name: shivas_guard
119.lore: Said to have belonged to a goddess, today it retains much of its former power.

abilities.title: Arctic Blast
abilities.description:
Emits a freezing wave that causes enemies to take 15% more damage from spells for 16 seconds, deals 200 magical damage and slows their movement by -40% for 4 seconds.

Radius: 900

abilities.title: Freezing Aura
abilities.description:
Reduces the attack speed of all enemies by -45 and Health Restoration and Incoming Heal Amplification by 25%. 

Radius: 1200

121.name: bloodstone
121.lore: The Bloodstone's bright ruby color is unmistakable on the battlefield, as the owner seems to have infinite vitality and spirit.

abilities.title: Bloodpact
abilities.description:
Increases Bloodstone's Spell Lifesteal by 3x. Lasts 5 seconds. 

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

123.name: sphere
123.lore: This magical sphere once protected one of the most famous heroes in history.

abilities.title: Spellblock
abilities.description: Blocks most targeted spells once every 14 seconds.

abilities.title: Transfer Spellblock
abilities.description: Temporarily removes Spellblock from the item's owner and transfers it to an allied unit for 14 seconds.

125.name: vanguard
125.lore: A powerful shield that defends its wielder from even the most vicious of attacks.

abilities.title: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants a 60% chance to block 50 damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and 25 damage on ranged.

127.name: blade_mail
127.lore: A razor-sharp coat of mail, it is the choice of selfless martyrs in combat.

abilities.title: Damage Return
abilities.description: For 5.5 seconds, return all incoming damage, increasing the percentage by 85%.

abilities.title: Damage Return
abilities.description: Everytime you are attacked, you return 10 damage plus 15% of the attack damage dealt to you.

131.name: hood_of_defiance
131.lore: A furred, magic resistant headpiece that is feared by wizards.

abilities.title: Barrier
abilities.description: Creates a spell shield that absorbs up to 350 magical damage. Lasts 12 seconds.

133.name: rapier
133.lore: So powerful, it cannot have a single owner.

abilities.title: Transmute
abilities.description: Toggle to gain either 25% bonus spell amplification or 250 bonus attack damage.

abilities.title: Everlasting
abilities.description:
Dropped on death, and cannot be destroyed. 

Becomes unusable if picked up by an ally of its owner until it is returned to its owner. It is immediately usable by anybody if an enemy of the owner picks it up and is killed. A dropped Rapier cannot be picked up by a courier.

135.name: monkey_king_bar
135.lore: A powerful staff used by a master warrior.

abilities.title: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 80% chance to pierce through evasion and deal 70 bonus magical damage.

137.name: radiance
137.lore: A divine weapon that causes damage and a bright burning effect that lays waste to nearby enemies.

abilities.title: Burn
abilities.description:
When active, scorches enemies for 60 magical damage per second. Illusions deal 35 magical damage per second.

Radius: 650

139.name: butterfly
139.lore: Only the mightiest and most experienced of warriors can wield the Butterfly, but it provides incredible dexterity in combat.

141.name: greater_crit
141.lore: A weapon of incredible power that is difficult for even the strongest of warriors to control.

abilities.title: Critical Strike
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 30% chance to deal 225% damage.

143.name: basher
143.lore: A feared weapon in the right hands, this maul's ability to shatter the defenses of its opponents should not be underestimated.

abilities.title: Bash
abilities.description: Grants melee heroes a 25% chance on hit to stun the target for 1.2 seconds and deal 100 bonus physical damage. Bash chance for ranged heroes is 10%.

145.name: bfury
145.lore: The bearer of this mighty axe gains the ability to cut down swaths of enemies at once.

abilities.title: Chop Tree
abilities.description: Destroy a target tree.

abilities.title: Quell
abilities.description: Increases attack damage against non-hero units by 10 for melee heroes, and 5 for ranged.

abilities.title: Cleave
abilities.description: Deals 60% of attack damage as physical damage in a cone up to 650 around the target. Deals 40% against creeps. (Melee Only)

147.name: manta
147.lore: An axe made of reflective materials that causes confusion amongst enemy ranks.

abilities.title: Mirror Image
abilities.description:
Creates 2 images of your hero that last 18 seconds. 

Melee images deal 33% damage, while Ranged images deal 28%. Illusions take 300% damage. 

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

149.name: lesser_crit
149.lore: A blade forged from rare crystals, it seeks weak points in enemy armor.

abilities.title: Critical Strike
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 30% chance to deal 160% damage.

151.name: armlet
151.lore: Weapon of choice among brutes, the bearer sacrifices his life energy to gain immense strength and power.

abilities.title: Unholy Strength
abilities.description:
When active, Unholy Strength grants +35 damage, +25 strength and +4 armor, but drains 45 health per second.

 You cannot die from the health drain when Unholy Strength is activated, nor from the strength loss when Unholy Strength is deactivated.

152.name: invis_sword
152.lore: The blade of a fallen king, it allows you to move unseen and strike from the shadows.

abilities.title: Shadow Walk
abilities.description:
Makes you invisible for 17 seconds, or until you attack or cast a spell. While Shadow Walk is active, you move 20% faster and can move through units. 

If attacking to end the invisibility, you gain 175 bonus physical damage on that attack.

154.name: sange_and_yasha
154.lore: Sange and Yasha, when attuned by the moonlight and used together, become a very powerful combination.

156.name: satanic
156.lore: Immense power at the cost of your soul.

abilities.title: Unholy Rage
abilities.description:
Increases Lifesteal percentage to 175% for 6 seconds. 

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Lifesteal
abilities.description: Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.

158.name: mjollnir
158.lore: Thor's magical hammer, made for him by the dwarves Brok and Eitri.

abilities.title: Static Charge
abilities.description: Places a charged shield on a target unit for 15 seconds which has a 20% chance to release a 225 magical damage shocking bolt at a nearby attacker and 4 additional enemies.

abilities.title: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Grants a 25% chance on attack to release a bolt of electricity that leaps between 12 targets within a 650 radius, dealing 180 magical damage to each. Lightning proc pierces evasion.

160.name: skadi
160.lore: Extremely rare artifact, guarded by the azure dragons.

abilities.title: Cold Attack
abilities.description: Attacks lower enemy movement by -25% if they are melee and -50% if they are ranged. Attacks also lower enemy attack speed by -20%. Additionally it reduces Health Restoration by 40% and Incoming Heals by 40% Lasts for 3 seconds.

162.name: sange
162.lore: Sange is an unusually accurate weapon, seeking weak points automatically.

164.name: helm_of_the_dominator
164.lore: The powerful headpiece of a dead necromancer.

abilities.title: Dominate
abilities.description:
Takes control of one neutral, non-ancient target unit and sets its movement speed to 370 and max health to a minimum of 1000. Also provides the unit with +25 base attack damage, +12 health regen, +4 mana regen and +4 armor. 

Dominated units with a max health of greater than 1000 retain their original max health. Grants the caster 50% of the gold and experience bounty of the dominated creep. Dominated unit's bounty is set to 100 gold and it can no longer be killed by abilities that instantly kill creeps otherwise.

The Helm cannot be used for 3 seconds after the dominated creep takes damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

166.name: maelstrom
166.lore: A hammer forged for the gods themselves, Maelstrom allows its user to harness the power of lightning.

abilities.title: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Grants a 25% chance on attack to release a bolt of electricity that leaps between 4 targets within a 650 radius, dealing 110 magical damage to each. Lightning proc pierces evasion.

168.name: desolator
168.lore: A wicked weapon, used in torturing political criminals.

abilities.title: Corruption
abilities.description: Your attacks reduce the target's armor by -6 for 7 seconds.

abilities.title: Soul Stealer
abilities.description: Desolator gains +2 damage every time an enemy hero dies while affected by Corruption, to a maximum of 30.

170.name: yasha
170.lore: Yasha is regarded as the swiftest weapon ever created.

172.name: mask_of_madness
172.lore: Once this mask is worn, its bearer becomes an uncontrollable aggressive force.

abilities.title: Berserk
abilities.description: Gives 100 attack speed and 25 movement speed, but reduces your armor by 8 and silences you. Lasts 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Lifesteal
abilities.description: Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.

174.name: diffusal_blade
174.lore: An enchanted blade that allows the user to cut straight into the enemy's soul.

abilities.title: Inhibit
abilities.description: Targets an enemy, slowing it for 4 seconds.

abilities.title: Manabreak
abilities.description:
Each attack burns 40 mana from the target, and deals 1 physical damage per burned mana. 

Illusions do not burn mana.

176.name: ethereal_blade
176.lore: A flickering blade of a ghastly nature, it is capable of dealing damage in both magical and physical planes.

abilities.title: Ether Blast
abilities.description:
Converts the target unit to ethereal form, rendering them immune to physical damage, but unable to attack and -30% more vulnerable to magic damage.

 Enemy targets are also slowed by -80%, and take 1x the sum of all your attributes + 50 as magical damage.
Duration: 4 seconds

178.name: soul_ring
178.lore: A ring that feeds on the souls of those who wear it.

abilities.title: Sacrifice
abilities.description:
Consume %abilityhealthcost% health to temporarily gain 170 mana. Lasts 10 seconds.

If the mana gained cannot fit in your mana pool, it creates a buffer of mana that will be used before your mana pool.

180.name: arcane_boots
180.lore: Magi equipped with these boots are valued in battle.

abilities.title: Replenish
abilities.description:
Restores 150 mana to all nearby allies.

Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Basilius Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 1 mana regeneration to allies. 

Radius: 1200

181.name: orb_of_venom
181.lore: Envenoms your veapon with the venom of a venomous viper.

abilities.title: Poison Attack
abilities.description: Poisons the target, dealing 10 magical damage per second. Lasts for 3 seconds.

182.name: stout_shield
182.lore: One man's wine barrel bottom is another man's shield.

abilities.title: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants a 50% chance to block 20 damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and 8 damage on ranged.

185.name: ancient_janggo
185.lore: A relic that enchants the bodies of those around it for swifter movement in times of crisis.

abilities.title: Endurance
abilities.description:
Gives +35 attack speed and +13% movement speed to nearby allies for 6 seconds.

Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Swiftness Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 15 movement speed to allies. 

Radius: 1200

187.name: medallion_of_courage
187.lore: The bearer has no fear of combat.

abilities.title: Valor
abilities.description:
If cast on an ally, grants them the -6 armor, and removing it from the caster. 

If cast on an enemy, reduces -6 armor on both the enemy and the caster. .

Duration: 8

188.name: smoke_of_deceit
188.lore: The charlatan wizard Myrddin's only true contribution to the arcane arts.

abilities.title: Disguise
abilities.description:
Turns the caster and all allied player-controlled units in a 1200 radius invisible, and grants 15% bonus movement speed for 45 seconds. 

 While the caster is still disguised, any allies that come within 300 range of them will also get the buff applied to them. Each smoke can only be applied once to allies. 

Attacking or moving within 1025 range of an enemy hero or tower, will break the invisibility. 

Disguise grants invisibility that is immune to True Sight. 

Smoke of Deceit is usable from the backpack and has no cooldown when swapped into the main inventory.

abilities.title: Magic Weakness
abilities.description:
Cast a 900 radius blast that causes enemy heroes to take 10% increased damage from spells.

Can be cast while channeling.

Duration: 16 seconds.

193.name: necronomicon_2
193.lore: Considered the ultimate in necromancy and demonology, a powerful malefic force is locked within its pages.

abilities.title: Demonic Summoning
abilities.description:
Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for 60 seconds.

Warrior: Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 25
Mana Break Damage: 30
Last Will Damage: 600

Archer: Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 37
Aura Move Speed: 5
Aura Radius: 1200

194.name: necronomicon_3
194.lore: Considered the ultimate in necromancy and demonology, a powerful malefic force is locked within its pages.

abilities.title: Demonic Summoning
abilities.description:
Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for 60 seconds.

Warrior: Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 25
Mana Break Damage: 30
Last Will Damage: 600

Archer: Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: 800
Damage: 37
Aura Move Speed: 5
Aura Radius: 1200

196.name: diffusal_blade_2
196.lore: An enchanted blade that allows the user to cut straight into the enemy's soul.

201.name: dagon_2
201.lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.title: Energy Burst
abilities.description:
Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Heals the caster 75% of damage dealt by Dagon. Upgradable.

Damage: 400
 Mana Cost: 120

202.name: dagon_3
202.lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.title: Energy Burst
abilities.description:
Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Heals the caster 75% of damage dealt by Dagon. Upgradable.

Damage: 400
 Mana Cost: 120

203.name: dagon_4
203.lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.title: Energy Burst
abilities.description:
Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Heals the caster 75% of damage dealt by Dagon. Upgradable.

Damage: 400
 Mana Cost: 120

204.name: dagon_5
204.lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.title: Energy Burst
abilities.description:
Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Heals the caster 75% of damage dealt by Dagon. 

Damage: 400
 Mana Cost: 120

206.name: rod_of_atos
206.lore: Atos, the Lord of Blight, has his essence stored in this deceptively simple wand.

abilities.title: Cripple
abilities.description: Roots the target for 2 seconds.

208.name: abyssal_blade
208.lore: The lost blade of the Commander of the Abyss, this edge cuts into an enemy's soul.

abilities.title: Overwhelm
abilities.description:
Stuns a target enemy unit for 1.6 seconds. 

Pierces Debuff Immunity.

abilities.title: Bash
abilities.description: Grants melee heroes a 25% chance on hit to stun the target for 1.2 seconds and deal 120 bonus physical damage. Bash chance for ranged heroes is 10%.

210.name: heavens_halberd
210.lore: This halberd moves with the speed of a smaller weapon, allowing the bearer to win duels that a heavy edge would not.

abilities.title: Disarm
abilities.description: Prevents a target from attacking for 3 seconds.

abilities.title: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants a 60% chance to block 60 damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and 30 damage on ranged.

212.name: ring_of_aquila
212.lore: The ring of the fallen Warlord Aquila continues to support armies in battle.

abilities.title: Aquila Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 1 mana regeneration and 2 armor to nearby allies.

Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Aura
abilities.description: Deactivate to stop affecting non-hero units.

214.name: tranquil_boots
214.lore: While they increase the longevity of the wearer, this boot is not particularly reliable.

abilities.title: Break
abilities.description: Whenever you attack a hero or are attacked by any unit, the bonus 14 HP regen is lost and the movement speed bonus is reduced to 40 for 13 seconds.

215.name: shadow_amulet
215.lore: A small talisman that clouds the senses of one's enemies when held perfectly still.

abilities.title: Fade
abilities.description: Grants invisibility to you or a target allied hero for 3.5s. Movement speed during the invisibility is reduced by 35%.

216.name: enchanted_mango
216.lore: The bittersweet flavors of Jidi Isle are irresistible to amphibians.

abilities.title: Eat Mango
abilities.description: Instantly restores 100 mana.

218.name: ward_dispenser
218.lore: Advancements in stacking efficiency have made wards easier to carry than ever.

abilities.title: Plant
abilities.description: Plant the currently active ward. Double-Click to switch the currently active ward.

abilities.title: Town Portal Scroll
abilities.description: Upgrades your Town Portal Scroll, allowing it to target units and heroes, reduces cooldown, channel time and does not consume a charge on usage.

abilities.title: Meteor Hammer
abilities.description:
CHANNELED - After a successful channel, summons a meteor that strikes a 400 AoE, stunning enemies for 0.75 seconds and dealing impact damage. Continues to deal damage over time to enemies units and buildings for 6 seconds. Non-building units are also slowed for 20% for the duration of the burn. 

Building Impact Damage: 90 
Building Over Time Damage: 50 

Non-Building Impact Damage: 130 
Non-Building Over Time Damage: 50 

Channel Duration: 2 seconds.
Landing Time: 0.5 seconds.

abilities.title: Nullify
abilities.description:
Dispels the target and applies a debuff for 4 seconds. Continuously dispels and slows the target.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

226.name: lotus_orb
226.lore: The jewel at its center still reflects a pale image of its creator.

abilities.title: Echo Shell
abilities.description:
Applies a shield to the target unit for 5 seconds which re-casts most targeted spells back to their caster.

The shielded unit will still take damage from the spell.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

229.name: solar_crest
229.lore: A talisman forged to honor the daytime sky.

abilities.title: Shine
abilities.description:
When cast on an ally, grants them 5 armor, 60 attack speed, 15% movement speed and a 350 physical damage barrier. 

Does not grant bonus armor, movement or attack speed if used on self. 

Duration: 7

231.name: guardian_greaves
231.lore: One of many holy instruments constructed to honor the Omniscience.

abilities.title: Mend
abilities.description:
Restores 325 health and 200 mana to nearby allies, and removes most negative effects from the caster.

Radius: 1200
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Guardian Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 2.5 health regeneration and 1.5 mana regeneration to allied units. If the wearer's health falls below 25%, their health regeneration is increased to 14.5. 

Radius: 1200

232.name: aether_lens
232.lore: Polished with the incantation of his final breath, the gift of a dying mage to his sickly son.

235.name: octarine_core
235.lore: At the core of spellcraft are spectrums only the very gifted can sense.

abilities.title: Cooldown Reduction
abilities.description: Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and items.

236.name: dragon_lance
236.lore: The forward charge of the wyvern host grants no quarter.

237.name: faerie_fire
237.lore: The ethereal flames from the ever-burning ruins of Kindertree ignite across realities.

abilities.title: Imbue
abilities.description: Instantly restores 85 health.

239.name: iron_talon
239.lore: A simple but effective weapon devised to quell a great Hellbear uprising.

abilities.title: Chop
abilities.description:
Targets a non-player enemy unit to remove 80% of its current HP.

If cast on a tree, instantly destroys it.

240.name: blight_stone
240.lore: An unnerving stone unearthed beneath the Fields of Endless Carnage.

abilities.title: Lesser Corruption
abilities.description: Your attacks reduce the target's armor by -2 for 3 seconds.

abilities.title: Devour
abilities.description:
Consumes a target tree to gain 3.5 health regeneration for 16 seconds. Consuming an Ironwood Tree doubles the heal duration.

Tree Range: 165

242.name: crimson_guard
242.lore: A cuirass originally built to protect against the dreaded Year Beast.

abilities.title: Guard
abilities.description:
For 7 seconds, grant nearby allied heroes and buildings a 100% chance to block damage equal to 70 plus 2.2% of the casters max health value from each incoming attack.
Units may only be affected by Guard once every 35 seconds.

Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants a 60% chance to block 75 damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and 50 damage on ranged.

244.name: wind_lace
244.lore: Hasten to battle on wind-touched heels.

247.name: moon_shard
247.lore: Said to be a tear from the lunar goddess Selemene.

abilities.title: Consume
abilities.description: Consume the Moon Shard to permanently gain 60 attack speed and 200 bonus night vision. Max 1 use.

abilities.title: Shade Sight
abilities.description: Grants bonus night vision.

249.name: silver_edge
249.lore: Once used to slay an unjust king, only to have the kingdom erupt into civil war in the aftermath.

abilities.title: Shadow Walk
abilities.description:
Makes you invisible for 17 seconds, or until you attack or cast a spell. While invisible, you move 25% faster and can move through units. 

Attacking to end the invisibility will deal 300 bonus physical damage, disable their passive abilities for 6 seconds, and cap their movement speed to 200.

250.name: bloodthorn
250.lore: A reviled blade that bites deeper with each wriggle of its victim's final throes.

abilities.title: Soul Rend
abilities.description:
Silences a target for 5 seconds. At the end of the silence, an additional 60% of all damage taken during the silence will be dealt to the target as magical damage.

All attacks on the silenced target will deal additional damage equal to 50 if the attacker is a hero, and 25, if the attacker is a creep. Provides True Strike for your attacks and attacks from your controlled units against the silenced target.

abilities.title: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 40% chance to pierce through evasion and deal 60 bonus magical damage.

252.name: echo_sabre
252.lore: A deceptively swift blade imbued with resonant magic.

abilities.title: Echo Strike
abilities.description: Causes melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession. The double attacks apply a 100% movement slow for 0.8 seconds on the first strike.

254.name: glimmer_cape
254.lore: The stolen cape of a master illusionist.

abilities.title: Glimmer
abilities.description:
After a 0.5 second delay, grants invisibility, 20 movement speed and a magic damage barrier that absorbs up to 375 damage to you or a target allied unit for 5 seconds.

Can be cast while channeling.

abilities.title: Combo Breaker
abilities.description: When you take damage and your health falls below 70%, a strong dispel is applied and you gain a 2.5 second buff that provides +75% Status Resistance and causes all damage you deal and are dealt to be reduced to zero. Only triggers on player based damage. Cooldown increases every time it triggers.Dispel Type: Strong Dispel

257.name: tome_of_knowledge
257.lore: That which raises beast to man and man to god.

abilities.title: Enlighten
abilities.description: Grants you 750 experience plus 150 per tome consumed by your team after the first two.

abilities.title: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Resets the cooldowns of all your items and abilities. Shares a cooldown with Refresher Orb. This item's cooldown only progresses in your hero's main inventory.

261.name: crown
261.lore: A stately crown created to ensure a well-meaning but ungifted heir could fend off usurpers and govern with a strong hand.

263.name: hurricane_pike
263.lore: A legendary pike once held as royal sigil of the ancient wyvern riders.

abilities.title: Hurricane Thrust
abilities.description:
Pushes you and target enemy 450 units away from each other, and for 6 seconds, allows you to make 5 attacks against the target without range restrictions and with +100 attack speed.

Can be cast on self or allies to push the target 600 units in the direction it is facing.
Enemy Range: 450

abilities.title: Magical Damage Block
abilities.description:
Consumes a charge to block 120 magic damage from damage instances over 75 damage. 

Comes with 6 charges. When the charges are gone, the item disappears.

abilities.title: Soul Release
abilities.description:
When used against enemies, it reduces health by 4% of current health per second, and reduces Health Restoration by 70% and incoming heals by 70%. Deals 25 damage per second. 

When used on allies, it provides 40 health regeneration per second. 

Lasts 8 seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within 1500 units or the user dies.

269.name: holy_locket
269.lore: A prized relic long thought lost forever in a failed crusade.

abilities.title: Energy Charge
abilities.description:
Target an allied unit to increase their incoming Heal Amplification by 10% for 4s and instantly restore 17 health and 15 mana per charge stored. 

Automatically gains a charge every 10 seconds and whenever a visible enemy within 1200 range uses an ability.

abilities.title: Holy Blessing
abilities.description: Amplifies heals you provide by 15%.

271.name: ultimate_scepter_2
271.lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

abilities.title: Ability Upgrade
abilities.description: Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.

273.name: kaya_and_sange
273.lore: Two of three known items of unimaginable power that many believe were crafted at the same enchanter's forge.

277.name: yasha_and_kaya
277.lore: Yasha and Kaya when paired together share a natural resonance.

279.name: ring_of_tarrasque
279.lore: An ageless ring forged with an otherwise simple blood magic amplified by the presumed source of its key component.

287.name: keen_optic
287.lore: Stolen from a tinker's shop ages ago, this handy lens has seen service to many owners.

288.name: grove_bow
288.lore: A gift from the moon goddess to one of her prized disciples many memories ago.

abilities.title: Magic Amp
abilities.description: Reduces magic resistance of the attacked enemy by 20%.

289.name: quickening_charm
289.lore: An evergreen amulet of druidic origins.

abilities.title: Cooldown Reduction
abilities.description: Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and items.

290.name: philosophers_stone
290.lore: A weightless charm created by an enchanter with a powerful scorn for brute force.

291.name: force_boots
291.lore: Elusive marvels never successfully studied for proper classification in the archives.

abilities.title: Force
abilities.description:
Pushes the target 750 units in the direction they are facing. Dispels if cast on an ally.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Speed Unlock
abilities.description: Completely removes the speed limit for the wearer

abilities.title: Rebirth
abilities.description: Lethal damage is prevented and instead the wearer is healed to half health and non-ultimate ability cooldowns reset. Gets consumed on trigger.

294.name: seer_stone
294.lore: The curious creation of a wizard who professed to hail from another time.

abilities.title: Reveal
abilities.description: Reveal a target 800 area of the map for 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Toughen Up
abilities.description: Grants you an extra 6 bonus armor at the cost of -20 movement speed. Lasts 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Imbue
abilities.description: Instantly restores 250 health.

300.name: timeless_relic
300.lore: An unmarred discovery from the excavated ruins of an ancient wizard's academy.

301.name: mirror_shield
301.lore: The shield that long ago robbed the old one of his first memories.

abilities.title: Echo Shield
abilities.description: Block and reflect most targeted spells back to their caster once every 12 seconds.

abilities.title: Consume
abilities.description:
Restores 500 health and 250 mana to the target over 6 seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

304.name: ironwood_tree
304.lore: Precious. And hearty as a weed.

abilities.title: Plant Tree
abilities.description: Targets the ground to plant a happy little tree that lasts for 20 seconds.

305.name: royal_jelly
305.lore: To those who harvest olgru jelly, success serves more than mere profit--it's often the means to survival--for only the jelly itself can cure the ravages that follow a sting from the vigilant denizens of the giant hives.

abilities.title: Consume
abilities.description:
Consumes all charges and grants a target allied unit a buff that provides +2.5 Health Regen and +1.25 Mana Regen per charge for 8s. 

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

306.name: pupils_gift
306.lore: An astounding plate of ever-replenishing, fortifying fruit.

abilities.title: Consume
abilities.description: Temporarily grants an allied target the Aghanim's Scepter buff for 3 minutes.

abilities.title: Building Repair
abilities.description: Targets a building, restoring 40% of it's health over 30 seconds. Also grants +10 armor during this period.

309.name: mind_breaker
309.lore: A bewitching blade of indeterminate form capable of piercing the psyche of even the most willful foe.

abilities.title: Silence Strike
abilities.description: The next attack silences the hit enemy for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.title: True Sight
abilities.description: Grants the ability to see invisible units and wards to any allied vision within 500 range of its carrier.

abilities.title: Charge Loss
abilities.description: Loses a charge on death. After all charges are lost, the item disappears.

311.name: spell_prism
311.lore: Even the slightest flaw in the components of a spell prism can result in the death of its user.

abilities.title: Cooldown Reduction
abilities.description: Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and items.

abilities.title: Consume
abilities.description: Grants the target the bonuses of every Power Rune for 50 seconds. Each use consumes a charge.

abilities.title: Hex Strike
abilities.description: The next attack hexes the hit enemy into a frog for 1.5 seconds.

327.name: helm_of_the_undying
327.lore: The price for wearing it is paid in the afterlife.

abilities.title: Death Delay
abilities.description: Survive for an extra 6 seconds after receiving a killing blow. If any enemy heroes dies within 1200 units, the death delay effect is extended by 5 seconds. The hero cannot attack buildings during Death Delay.

abilities.title: Plant a Mango Tree
abilities.description: Targets the ground to plant a mango tree that provides unlimited mango power. The tree generates Enchanted Mangoes every 60 seconds, and provides unobstructed vision in the area .

331.name: vambrace
331.lore: The coveted treasure that divided the heirs of Queen Raiya upon her death, resulting in the eventual downfall of her kingdom.

334.name: imp_claw
334.lore: Though their tasks are largely thankless, demon hunters can often turn a profit bartering parts in Weeping Rose.

abilities.title: Critical Strike
abilities.description: Empowers your next attack, causing it to be a critical strike dealing 130% damage.

335.name: flicker
335.lore: The technically-true-to-his-word 'teleportation device' crafted by a notorious fae trickster.

abilities.title: Flicker
abilities.description:
Dispells debuffs and blinks you in a random forward direction for a random distance between 200 and 600. If cast within 3 seconds of receiving player damage, it will blink in place.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

336.name: spy_gadget
336.lore: A handy tool that manages to make close what once was far.

abilities.title: Prescient Aura
abilities.description: Lowers Scan cooldown by 50% . Increases attack range (Ranged only) and cast range of allies in a 1200 unit radius.

349.name: arcane_ring
349.lore: Once a prized heirloom of a minor lord's house.

abilities.title: Replenish Mana
abilities.description:
Restores mana equal to 30 + 3% of the caster's maximum mana pool to all nearby allies. 

 Radius: 1200

354.name: ocean_heart
354.lore: A charm blessed by the Council of the Brine.

abilities.title: Water Regen
abilities.description: Provides you with 10 HP regen and 5 mana regen while in the river.

355.name: broom_handle
355.lore: The surprisingly dangerous creation of an apprentice sorcerer with a strange fondness for brooms.

356.name: trusty_shovel
356.lore: Former plaything of a young deity, received as a gift from his uncle.

abilities.title: Dig
abilities.description:
Channel for 1 second. 
Can find a Bounty Rune, a Healing Salve, an Enchanted Mango, or a Kobold. If digging in a river, always digs up a Water Rune.

357.name: nether_shawl
357.lore: An otherworldly garment tethered to our plane by unknown means.

358.name: dragon_scale
358.lore: The remains of a dragon always outvalue the wealth of even the most prodigious hoard.

abilities.title: Afterburn
abilities.description: Causes attacks to burn the enemy, dealing 22 damage per second for 3 seconds. Affects buildings.

abilities.title: Ensnare
abilities.description: Ensnares the target enemy and yourself for 1.75 seconds.

361.name: enchanted_quiver
361.lore: A graceful gift blessed by the goddess of the hunt.

abilities.title: Certain Strike
abilities.description: Empowers your next attack with 250 bonus magical damage and True Strike. Ranged Attackers have +350 bonus range for the attack.

362.name: ninja_gear
362.lore: Valuable equipment recovered by a young explorer sifting through the flotsam and detritus drifting in the void.

abilities.title: Solitary Disguise
abilities.description: Casts Smoke of Deceit on yourself only that lasts for up to 15 seconds.

363.name: illusionsts_cape
363.lore: A dashing cape whose creator insists on calling 'Cloak of Apparition' as opposed to his assistant's 'Illusion' drivel.

abilities.title: Create Illusion
abilities.description: Creates an image under your control.

abilities.title: Illusion Mastery
abilities.description: Increases outgoing damage of all units and illusions controlled by the hero by 6%.

abilities.title: Havoc
abilities.description: Pulls enemies in a 400 range around you, slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 + 1.5x your str as magical damage.

abilities.title: Rejuvenate
abilities.description: When the wearer's health falls below 20%, they will receive a strong dispel and be healed for 1500 health.Dispel Type: Strong Dispel

366.name: apex
366.lore: Three orbs of remarkable power bound within a single scepter.

367.name: ballista
367.lore: A simple design much improved by a master smith's loving hand.

abilities.title: Knockback
abilities.description: Knocks back enemies 50 distance and deals 50 pure damage with every attack.

abilities.title: Woodland Stride
abilities.description: Create a path of trees behind you for 3 seconds. Trees last up to 15 seconds.

abilities.title: Tree Walking
abilities.description: Removes movement speed limit and allows free pathing through trees.

372.name: pirate_hat
372.lore: A salty skulltopper cursed with endless good fortune.

abilities.title: Plunder
abilities.description: Steals 150 gold from enemy heroes that die within 2400 units. If the wearer is the killer, there is no range limit and an additional 400 gold is stolen.

abilities.title: Buried Treasure
abilities.description: Gold loss on death reduced by 100%.

374.name: ex_machina
374.lore: The remains of an ancient universe, preserved within a single sphere.

abilities.title: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Reset the cooldown on all items (except Refresher Orb).

375.name: faded_broach
375.lore: A life-saving jewel bestowed upon a young queen by a kindly vizier.

376.name: paladin_sword
376.lore: The sigil blade of the legendary Brother Yhols of Gausra, stripped from its scabbard on the day of his controversial excommunication.

378.name: orb_of_destruction
378.lore: An ingot of chaos suspended in wizard's ether, housed within an arcanist's orb.

abilities.title: Impeding Corruption
abilities.description: Attacks reduce the target's armor and movement speed. Slow amount varies based on whether the wearer is melee or ranged.

379.name: the_leveller
379.lore: A demonic blade that struck the final blow to crack the gates of the Sanctum of Solanas.

abilities.title: Level
abilities.description: Attacks deal 35% more damage to buildings.

381.name: titan_sliver
381.lore: Though many desire this brilliant shard for its obvious qualities, a school of study exists to determine the true size and purpose of its incomprehensible whole.

473.name: voodoo_mask
473.lore: A mask tuned to sip the arcane bindings that pass between caster and foe.

abilities.title: Magic Lifesteal
abilities.description: Magical damage dealt to enemy heroes is returned to the caster as health.

485.name: blitz_knuckles
485.lore: An underground arcanist's update of a back-alley classic.

534.name: witch_blade
534.lore: A spiteful blade inadvertently possessed by the soul of its incautious creator.

abilities.title: Witch Blade
abilities.description: Causes your next attack to apply a poison for 4 seconds, slowing by 25% and dealing 0.75x your intelligence as damage every second. This attack has True Strike.

569.name: orb_of_corrosion
569.lore: Seepage from the wounds of a warrior deity, sealed in an arcanist's orb following a campaign of vicious slaughter.

abilities.title: Corrosion
abilities.description: Your attacks reduce the target's armor by -2, slows their movement by -16% (-8% against melee targets), and reduces Health Restoration by 16%. Lasts for 3 seconds.

571.name: trickster_cloak
571.lore: A fantastic garment immediately misplaced by its creator upon completion.

abilities.title: Cloak
abilities.description: Causes you to become invisible for 6 seconds.

573.name: elven_tunic
573.lore: Even simple items of elven make seem imbued with inexplicable efficacy.

574.name: cloak_of_flames
574.lore: A very fine cloak that plays host to an overly-protective living flame.

abilities.title: Immolate
abilities.description:
Burns enemy units for 45 damage per second. Illusions deal 30 damage per second.

Radius: 375

577.name: possessed_mask
577.lore: Even when discarded with specific purpose and great care, this frightening mask always finds its way onto the face of a new owner.

abilities.title: Lifesteal
abilities.description: Heals the attacker for 7 HP on each attack.

585.name: stormcrafter
585.lore: The accidental byproduct of a spell conjured to entrap a lesser god.

abilities.title: Bottled Lightning
abilities.description: Zaps 2 enemy targets within 700 range, dealing 175 damage and a 40% slow for 0.4 seconds. Strikes every 3.5 seconds.

589.name: mysterious_hat
589.lore: A small token imbued with the fortune of the fae in recognition of an intriguing display of mortal kindness.

593.name: fluffy_hat
593.lore: Fine and functional foppery for the fashion-forward fighter.

596.name: falcon_blade
596.lore: An enchanted blade that long ago raised a hopeless urchin from pauper to king.

598.name: mage_slayer
598.lore: Forged by a secret order in The Third Age of Praxa'cia to fell the False King.

abilities.title: Mage Slayer
abilities.description: Places a debuff when you attack enemies, dealing 20 damage per second and causing them to do 40% less spell damage for 3 seconds.

600.name: overwhelming_blink
600.lore: A horrifying dagger forged in the chaos maw and nigh untouchable by mortal hands.

abilities.title: Overwhelming Blink
abilities.description:
Teleport to a target point up to 1200 units away.

After teleportation, all enemies in a 800 AoE take damage equal to 100 + 50% of your strength and an additional 100% over time, and have 50% movement speed slow and 50 attack speed slow for 6 seconds. 

Overwhelming Blink cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

603.name: swift_blink
603.lore: A cunning blade able to anticipate and enable its bearer's movements.

abilities.title: Swift Blink
abilities.description:
Teleport to a target point up to 1200 units away.

After teleportation, you gain 40% phased movement speed and +35 Agility for 6 seconds. 

Swift Blink cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

604.name: arcane_blink
604.lore: A revitalizing tool to help bear the weight of arcane expenditure.

abilities.title: Arcane Blink
abilities.description:
Teleport to a target point up to 1400 units away. 

After teleportation, you restore 250 health and 100 mana.

Arcane Blink cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

609.name: aghanims_shard
609.lore: With origins known only to a single wizard, fragments of this impossible crystal are nearly as coveted as the renowned scepter itself.

abilities.title: Ability Upgrade
abilities.description: Upgrades an existing ability or adds a new ability to your hero.

610.name: wind_waker
610.lore: Proof enough to some that unseen forces manipulate the happenings of the material plane.

abilities.title: Cyclone
abilities.description:
Sweeps a target unit up into a cyclone, making them invulnerable for 2.5 seconds. Cyclone can be cast on yourself, enemy units or allied units.

Enemy units take 50 magical damage upon landing.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

635.name: helm_of_the_overlord
635.lore: The powerful headpiece of an undead necromancer.

abilities.title: Dominate
abilities.description:
Takes control of one neutral target unit and sets its movement speed to 380 and max health to a minimum of 1800. Also provides the unit with +70 base attack damage, +12 health regen, +4 mana regen, +7 armor, and levels up some abilities of the target by 1 level. 

Dominated units with a max health of greater than 1800 retain their original max health. Grants the caster the gold and experience bounty of the dominated creep. Dominated unit's bounty is set to 250 gold and it can no longer be killed by abilities that instantly kill creeps otherwise.

The Helm cannot be used for 3 seconds after the dominated creep takes damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

638.name: penta_edged_sword
638.lore: The final, twisted work of a severely pious blacksmith, completed immediately before the taking of his own life.

abilities.title: Maim
abilities.description: Each attack has a 25% chance to reduce enemy hero movement speed by 20% and attack speed by 60 for 3 seconds.

676.name: ceremonial_robe
676.lore: One of many items lost in the looting of Zelenwyr's sacred reliquary.

abilities.title: Ceremonial Aura
abilities.description:
Lowers enemy Status Resistance by 10% and Magic Resistance by 10%.

Radius: 1200

677.name: book_of_shadows
677.lore: An impossible tome filled with unreadable prose of unknowable thoughts.

abilities.title: Shadows
abilities.description: Target an enemy, ally or self. Causes the target to become untargetable from enemies to the caster, but also silenced, muted and disarmed for 4 seconds. Applies a Basic Dispel.

678.name: giants_ring
678.lore: Prized procurement of an otherwise unremarkable ruler of Elze who abdicated his position and vanished.

abilities.title: Giant's Foot
abilities.description: Can path over any terrain and deals 100% of your strength per second to units you are standing ontop of.

abilities.title: Vengeance's Shadow
abilities.description: Upon death, you spawn a strong-illusion that deals 100% damage and takes 150% damage. Can cast all basic spells. Illusion casts 30 seconds.

680.name: bullwhip
680.lore: Once the favored lash of an infamous broker of pit fighters and other live trade.

abilities.title: Whip
abilities.description: Grants 25% movement speed when cast on allies, and slows by 25% when cast on enemies. Lasts 4 seconds.

686.name: quicksilver_amulet
686.lore: An enchanted talisman brimming with a mysterious substance.

abilities.title: Quicksilver
abilities.description: Grants you a bonus 5% movement speed and 20 attack speed anytime one of your abilities are on cooldown.

692.name: eternal_shroud
692.lore: A pristine hood that feeds upon strife to empower its owner.

abilities.title: Shroud
abilities.description: Restores mana equal to 25% of incoming enemy spell damage before reductions.

abilities.title: Eternal Endurance
abilities.description: For every 300 spell damage that equipped hero receives, it gains a stack of Endurance for 5s up to a maximum of 6 charges. Each charge increases Eternal Shroud's magic resistance by 3.5% .

725.name: aghanims_shard_roshan
725.lore: With origins known only to a single wizard, fragments of this impossible crystal are nearly as coveted as the renowned scepter itself.

abilities.title: Ability Upgrade
abilities.description: Upgrades an existing ability or adds a new ability to your hero.

727.name: ultimate_scepter_roshan
727.lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

abilities.title: Ability Upgrade
abilities.description: Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.

825.name: ascetic_cap
825.lore: An austere hat thought to be of Turstarkuri origin.

abilities.title: Endurance
abilities.description: Whenever a debuff would be applied to the owner, grant 40% Status resistance and 40% Slow Resistance for 3 seconds.

828.name: misericorde
828.lore: An infamous assassin's blade stolen and smuggled out of White Spire after its owner's mysterious demise.

abilities.title: Dark Mercy
abilities.description: Your attacks deal 3 more damage to enemies for each 7% HP they are missing.

829.name: force_field
829.lore: An exquisite piece commissioned by a paranoid monarch who choked on a piece of fruit long before the item saw its intended use.

abilities.title: Mega Shield
abilities.description: Force Field Aura Grants 25% Damage Reflection for 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Shield
abilities.description: Grants +4 armor and +8% Magic Resistance to all other allies within 1200 radius.

834.name: black_powder_bag
834.lore: One of a set of custom rigs once worn by infamous road agents in the Outlands, its siblings have been lost to misfires and the various tides of time.

abilities.title: Hair Trigger
abilities.description: The next time you get attacked by a hero within 400 range, explode dealing 250 damage to all enemies within a 400 radius and causing them to miss 100% of their attacks for 2 seconds.

835.name: paintball
835.lore: Those marked for death by the fae shine brightly to all manner of creatures in the shadow realm.

abilities.title: Shadow Brand
abilities.description: Throws a Mark towards an enemy within 900 range applying a debuff that deals 40 damage every second and provides vision of the unit for 7 seconds.

837.name: heavy_blade
837.lore: With ready access to test subjects, untold cruelties have been dreamed up and loosed upon the world from within the walls of the Tyler Estate.

abilities.title: Cleanse
abilities.description:
Dispel Target Enemy or Ally.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Subjugate
abilities.description: Your attacks deal bonus damage equal to 4% of your target Max Mana.

838.name: unstable_wand
838.lore: A makeshift charm misplaced by a peace-loving, addlebrained enchanter.

abilities.title: Pig, Out!
abilities.description: Turns your hero into a critter for 3 seconds and gives them +20% Movement Speed.

911.name: revenants_brooch
911.lore: The cursed brooch of a fallen guardian who stalks forever between the veil of life and death.

abilities.title: Phantom Critical
abilities.description: Grants each attack a 30% chance to deal an additional 80% of the attack's damage as bonus magic damage.

931.name: boots_of_bearing
931.lore: Resplendent footwear fashioned for the ancient herald that first dared spread the glory of Stonehall beyond the original borders of its nascent claim.

abilities.title: Endurance
abilities.description:
Gives +50 attack speed and +15% movement speed to nearby allies for 6 seconds. For the first 1.5 seconds allies are immune to slows.

 Radius: 1200

abilities.title: Swiftness Aura
abilities.description:
Grants 20 movement speed to allies. 

Radius: 1200

939.name: harpoon
939.lore: A perfect solution for the flight of foes.

abilities.title: Draw Forth
abilities.description: When targeting an enemy, fire a harpoon at them, that pulls you and the target closer together, up to 35% of the distance between you and your target. If the caster is melee, the hero and target are always pulled to within melee distance of each other.

abilities.title: Echo Strike
abilities.description: Causes melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession. The double attacks apply a 100% movement slow for 1 seconds on the first strike. Echo Strike cooldown: 5s

945.name: seeds_of_serenity
945.lore: An evergreen sprout treasured by the woodkin and highly coveted by interlopers and their like.

abilities.title: Verdurous Dale
abilities.description: Target the ground with a 400 radius. Provides health regeneration to all allied units while they are in the area of effect equal to 6 + 25% of the caster's health regeneration at the time of casting. Lasts 8 seconds.

946.name: lance_of_pursuit
946.lore: The gleaming weapon of a tarnished knight haunted by his duties to an unworthy king.

abilities.title: Hound
abilities.description: Attacking from behind slows enemies by 16% (8% if Ranged) and deals 20 more damage. Slow lasts 2 second(s).

abilities.title: Ogre Seal Flop
abilities.description: Flop forward like an ogre seal 2 times, dealing 250 damage and slowing enemies in a 275 radius by -100% for 1.5 second on each bounce. 400 bounce distance.

990.name: eye_of_the_vizier
990.lore: The ring of a cunning court mage who imprisoned a cadre of enemies to serve as his personal mana reserve.

1076.name: specialists_array
1076.lore: An impressive kit of trigger enhancements born in an aging assassin's idle mind.

abilities.title: Crackshot
abilities.description:
Ranged attacks have a 25% chance to fire 2 additional projectiles at nearby targets with 225 extra range and within a 120 degree angle in front of the attacker.

These extra attacks deal 75% of the primary attack and do not trigger on hit effects.

1077.name: dagger_of_ristul
1077.lore: A sinister shiv that grants favor to those willing to stain its blade with a sacrifice of their own blood.

abilities.title: Imbrue
abilities.description: Consume 100 health to temporarily gain 40 damage. Lasts 8 seconds.

1090.name: muertas_gun
1090.lore: One to deliver the body, the other to claim the soul.

abilities.title: Dead Shot
abilities.description: Fires a ghostly bullet at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes it will deal 300 damage and slow the target by -100% for 0.5 seconds, then ricochet in the vector-targeted direction. The ricochet will damage all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet will be feared for 2 seconds in the direction of the shot.

1097.name: disperser
1097.lore: Once entrusted to an Apostle General of the Rumusque Faithful's expeditionary force.

abilities.title: Suppress
abilities.description:
Dispels both the wearer and the target. Enemy targets are slowed for 5 seconds. Allied targets gain bonus movespeed and 40% slow resistance for 5 seconds. Caster is always granted the ally benefit on cast.

Both movement speed reduction and increase start at 100% and gradually decrease to 0% over the course of the buff duration.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Manabreak
abilities.description:
Each attack burns 40 mana from the target, and deals 1 physical damage per burned mana. 

Illusions do not burn mana.

1107.name: phylactery
1107.lore: An amulet overflowing with powerful magics.

abilities.title: Empower Spell
abilities.description: The next Unit Target spell you cast on an enemy deals a separate 150 bonus damage to the target and slows them by 30% for 3s.

1122.name: diadem
1122.lore: A crown that can never be removed.

1123.name: blood_grenade
1123.lore: Both the hunter and the hunted must pay the blood price.

abilities.title: Throw Grenade
abilities.description: Throw a grenade at the target area. Enemies in the area will take 50 damage on impact, and be slowed by -15% and take 15 damage every 1s for 5 seconds. Radius 300.

1124.name: spark_of_courage
1124.lore: A common battle charm in the armies that served the Children of Light.

abilities.title: Courage
abilities.description: Provides 10 damage when the hero is above 50% Health, and 5 armor when they are below that threshold.

1125.name: cornucopia
1125.lore: A source of spiritual and physical nourishment.

1128.name: pavise
1128.lore: Devised by a wizard who made one too many enemies.

abilities.title: Protect
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, grants them a physical damage barrier that absorbs 250 damage. Duration: 7s.

1154.name: royale_with_cheese
1154.lore: First there was the Belt of Strength. Then there were the Boots of Travel. Now, at long last, the Block of Cheese.

abilities.title: Scrumptious
abilities.description: Try me!

abilities.title: Ancient Power
abilities.description: Grants 50 extra bonus damage as long as the unit is within 2000 range of an ancient.

abilities.title: Bubbled Up
abilities.description: Equipped Hero has a 100 HP Barrier against enemy damage. Barrier fully regenerates after not receiving damage for 8 seconds. Self-inflicted damage bypasses the barrier.

abilities.title: Glass Cannon
abilities.description: Hero takes 6% more damage from all sources.

abilities.title: Glassify
abilities.description: When attacking a hero, apply a debuff increasing the damage received by that hero by 12% for 5 seconds. Only one target can be affected by Glassify at the same time.

abilities.title: Free Bird
abilities.description: When equipped hero is below 30% HP, they gain flying movement.

abilities.title: Unwavering
abilities.description: Hero's Max Health is set to 1800 and can't be altered by other effects or attributes.

abilities.title: Profane Knowledge
abilities.description:
Hero kills and assists empower the Black Grimoire, granting it charges. Right-click to consume and grant 200 experience per charge. Starts on cooldown. 
This item cannot be dropped.

1466.name: gungir
1466.lore: Bindings forged by impossible means to leash an ancient evil.

abilities.title: Eternal Chains
abilities.description: Roots all enemies in a 350 radius for 2 seconds.

1575.name: orb_of_frost
1575.lore: Slowly growing since the universe began, it will envelop everything when it ends.

abilities.title: Frost
abilities.description: Your attacks slow the target's movement by -13% (-6% against melee targets), and reduces Health Restoration by 13%. Lasts for 3 seconds.

1600.name: rippers_lash
1600.lore: The Fae horticulturists of Revtel are known to push the boundaries of both cross pollination and safety.

abilities.title: Flay
abilities.description: Embeds thorns into all enemies in a 200 unit radius. Affected units take additional damage when attacked for 10 seconds.

1602.name: gale_guard
1602.lore: If one truly listens, they can always rely upon the wind to make its will known.

abilities.title: Cyclonic Shield
abilities.description: Envelops the caster in an all damage barrier that absorbs 75% of incoming damage up to a max of 225. Lasts for up to 10 seconds and while the barrier is active you have 50% Slow Resistance.

abilities.title: Keen Eye
abilities.description: Increases cast range by 100 and attack range by 100 (Melee & Ranged). Taking over 25 damage from a player controlled source or Roshan disables this effect for 6 seconds.

1608.name: pyrrhic_cloak
1608.lore: There are generals that care far less about the survival of their troops than the destruction of their enemies.

abilities.title: Retribution
abilities.description: For the next 6 seconds, 75% of damage taken by the caster is reflected to the target unit as physical damage if they are within 1200 units away.

abilities.title: Crystallize
abilities.description: For the next 8 seconds, up to 3 instances of spell damage over 30 have their damage reduced by 75.

1639.name: sisters_shroud
1639.lore: A pall that draped the sarcophagus of the First Sister.

abilities.title: Veiled
abilities.description: When falling below 50% HP, gain 150% evasion for 5 seconds. While active, dodging an attack decreases the evasion bonus by 75% of its current value.

abilities.title: Last Caress
abilities.description: Veiled cooldown is only reset if the wearer dies or kills an enemy hero.

1641.name: outworld_staff
1641.lore: Proof that the lone sentinel was not always so.

abilities.title: Self-Exile
abilities.description: Makes the caster completely invulnerable and disabled for 0.7 seconds. When returning to the world, the caster takes 5% of their maximum health as damage.

abilities.title: Fallen
abilities.description: You have died and thus get nothing.

abilities.title: Bloodbath
abilities.description: Converts a percentage of damage taken over the last 10 seconds into health regeneration, up to a maximum amount.

1802.name: tiara_of_selemene
1802.lore: A symbol of favor bestowed upon the high priestess of Selemene.

abilities.title: Flip
abilities.description: Toggle to convert 30% of your Max Health to Max Mana, or 30% of your Max Mana to Max Health.

abilities.title: Place Banner
abilities.description:
Creates a banner at the target location. Lane creeps in the area of effect become damage immune while the Banner is up. Lasts 120 seconds.

 Can be destroyed. Melee hero attacks deal 2x damage to the banner.

1806.name: devastator
1806.lore: Warning: There is no antidote if picked up by the wrong end.

abilities.title: Witch Blade
abilities.description: Causes your next attack to have true strike, apply a poison for 4 seconds, slowing by 25% and dealing 0.75x your intelligence as damage every second.

abilities.title: Magic Corruption
abilities.description: Your attacks reduce the enemy's Magic resistance by 20% for 4 seconds.

1808.name: angels_demise
1808.lore: A blade sharp enough to slice through magic itself.

abilities.title: Empower Spell
abilities.description: The next Unit Target spell you cast on an enemy deals a separate 250 additional damage, disables their passives, and slows their movement speed by 30% for 4s.

abilities.title: Vengeance
abilities.description: Provides 30 damage if equipped hero is Silenced and 20 armor if equipped hero is Stunned.

abilities.title: Magical Damage Block
abilities.description: Every 12s, blocks up to 300 magic damage from damage instances over 75 damage.

abilities.title: Martyrdom
abilities.description: Redirect 25% of all magic damage dealt to your allied heroes within 900 radius towards you for 10 seconds.

abilities.title: Sixth Sense
abilities.description: Automatically dodge an attack from an enemy hero.

abilities.title: Eat Lotus
abilities.description: Instantly restores 125 health and mana.

abilities.title: Eat Lotus
abilities.description: Instantly restores 400 health and mana.

abilities.title: Eat Lotus
abilities.description: Instantly restores 900 health and mana.

4300.name: ofrenda
4300.lore: Take joy in remembering those beloved who've passed now beyond the veil.

abilities.title: Honor the Dead
abilities.description: Place this Offering on an Altar to honor the dead with a memory from those they left behind.

4301.name: ofrenda_shovel
4301.lore: You don't know where it came from, but it knows where you need to go. All you need to do is dig.

abilities.title: Dig
abilities.description: Search the map for Offerings to the dead.

4302.name: ofrenda_pledge
4302.lore: This item seems unstable. Like it might just disappear.

abilities.title: Undying Promise
abilities.description: Signal to the spirits of the other realm your commitment to honoring them. If everyone in the battle makes an Undying Promise before the fight begins, the dead might be willing to listen.
